> atlas-vision-mcp@0.1.0 build
> tsup
 
✖ Build failed
src/tools/analyze-image.ts:23:5
error TS2322: Type 'string | undefined' is not assignable to type 'string'
 
21 | const url = config.vision.baseUrl;
22 | const endpoint = url + "/chat/completions";

The inferred type is 'string | undefined' but 'string' was expected.
Consider adding a non-null assertion or type guard.
